zh.lifeSummary: Dafydd Ap Ieuan是Ieuan Ap Trahaearn的兒子，出生。他至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Dafydd Ap Ieuan是Ieuan Ap Trahaearn的儿子，出生。他至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Dafydd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of David . In widespread use during the Middle Ages, it was later largely replaced by the English form, but since the late 19th century it has come into its own again.

en.lifeSummary: Dafydd Ap Ieuan was born as the son of Ieuan Ap Trahaearn. He had at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Dafydd Ap Ieuan est né, fils de Ieuan Ap Trahaearn. Il a eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Dafydd Ap Ieuan wurde, als Sohn von Ieuan Ap Trahaearn geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Dafydd Ap Ieuan è nato il come figlio di Ieuan Ap Trahaearn. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Dafydd Ap IeuanはIeuan Ap Trahaearnの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Dafydd Ap Ieuan(은)는 Ieuan Ap Trahaearn의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Dafydd Ap Ieuan nasceu filho de Ieuan Ap Trahaearn. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Dafydd Ap Ieuan родился. Его отца звали Ieuan Ap Trahaearn. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Dafydd Ap Ieuan nació como hijo de Ieuan Ap Trahaearn. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo.

th.–: ถึงแก่กรรม
th.–Male: ถึงแก่กรรม
